notice: Deployment-profile continuity corpus: every case and drill exercises the same shell module that About, diagnostics, support packets, admin-audit exports, release-evidence excerpts, status-bar deployment cells, companion surfaces, and CLI text formatters read. The corpus does not invent new runtime facts; it pins the matrix of marketed deployment rows and outage drills that beta-exit reviewers MUST be able to replay.

outage_drills.scenario_summary: Vendor control plane unreachable; relay, sync, and AI broker offline. Local data plane stays local-safe.
outage_drills.continuity_assertion: Control-plane impairment never collapses into generic 'service degraded' copy while local-safe data-plane work remains; the safest next action stays continue_local.

residual_dependency_matrix.overview: Per-profile residual-dependency posture, projected from the governance ledger. Forbidden postures fail closed; required postures back vendor-bound classes; mirrored postures resolve against a signed mirror only.
